heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 1516 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Congressional Budget Office $4,500,000 for each of the fiscal years 1996, 1997, 1998, 1999, 2000, 2001, and 2002 to carry out the provisions of this subchapter.
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title I of , , , which enacted this subchapter and sections 658 to 658g of this title, amended sections 602, 632, and 653 of this title, and enacted provisions set out as a note under .Pub. L. 104–4109 Stat. 50section 1511 of this titleMar. 22, 1995
